name: AIR-DROW Interaction & Vision Tutorial Edition
delivery: This complete final source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. node_modules and public are intentionally excluded because the production output is regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. Scanner status marks use resilient inline vectors for Android, while the editable local icon package remains available for future artwork replacement.
summary: A clean production release focused on responsive About cards, canvas-input isolation, verified bilingual copy, and refreshed GitHub covers.
releaseChecks: Version and build identifiers are synchronized across source, web manifests and service worker.
Toolbar and workspace controls are explicitly isolated from the canvas pointer pipeline.
About cards use stable responsive columns with QR and creator information kept side by side.
README cover visuals are shipped locally and validated by the production gate.
